baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Double-hit on 1–3 in negative GMI years.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: On a neg GMI double-hit year, this asset's income is treated as +1 higher before tax calculation. (The double-hit value loss still applies to asset value — only income is boosted.)
+1 loan cap after 2 consecutive years without a negative value roll.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 12.

flavourText: We don't take sides. We take both.
